utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all six sections. Checking completeness: (1) property – fully specified with type, location, price, size, taxes, fees, features, and availability; (2) financing – includes type, down payment, interest rate, term, fees, and estimated monthly payment; (3) legal_services – includes service name, fees, closing costs, title insurance, and total costs; (4) moving_services – includes both standard and full-service options with costs and features; (5) setup_services – includes two packages with costs and service lists; (6) total_budget – provides full cost breakdown and currency. All items are present and fully detailed according to requirements.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant selected a purchase property described as a 'Condo' in West End, Toronto, priced at CAD 468,000 with modern development and rooftop access. Among the ground-truth purchase options, the closest match in price and description is 'New Build' (CAD 480K, eco-friendly, modern, within budget), rated 10. The financing type chosen is 'Joint mortgage' with a 5.15% interest rate and a CAD 1,200 processing fee, which matches the 'Traditional Mortgage' option (arrangement fee CAD 1,200) rated 8. The legal service chosen is 'Premium Legal Package' rated 8. The moving service chosen is 'standard_move' costing CAD 650, corresponding to 'Standard Moving' rated 9.
